enum values Enabled, Disabled, and Auto not documented in comment for MetricsCollectorPolicy
validation marker MinItems=1 on targets contradicts documented behavior that list may be empty
MaxItems constraint not documented in comment for targets
Minimum and Maximum constraints not documented in comment for metricsPort
Minimum and Maximum constraints not documented in comment for maxRetries
documented relationship between maxRetries and retryInterval not enforced with XValidation rule
optional field metricsPort does not explain behavior when omitted
validation marker MinItems=1 on ignoredPaths contradicts documented behavior that empty list means no paths excluded
Minimum and Maximum constraints not documented in comment for scrapeInterval
MinLength and MaxLength constraints not documented in comment for certFile and keyFile
TLSConfig collector relationship "When the collector is disabled, this field is ignored" lacks XValidation rule
